# Wolfenstein 3D — 2026 Browser Remake

> A faithful browser-based remake of the classic 1992 FPS Wolfenstein 3D, reimagined with 2026 AI technology.

## About
This game was built by Richard Theuws (Creative Director, theuws.com) and Claude Opus 4.6 (AI Game Master by Anthropic) in approximately 6 hours of development time. It demonstrates the power of human-AI collaboration in game development.

## Play
- URL: https://theuws.com/games/wolfenstein-3d/
- Platform: Any modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Cost: Free to play
- Controls: WASD + Mouse (desktop), Touch joystick (mobile)

## Game Content
- 7 episodes: "Escape from Castle Wolfenstein", "Operation Eisenfaust", "Die, Führer, Die!", "A Dark Secret", "Trail of the Madman", "Confrontation", "The Nightmare" (bonus)
- 33 playable levels with increasing difficulty
- 7 boss fights: Hans Grösse, Dr. Schabbs, Hitler (2-phase mech suit + human), Otto Giftmacher (gas_cloud attack), Gretel Grösse (tactical hunter), General Fettgesicht (rocket attack), Der Übersoldat (ultimate bonus boss — all attacks combined)
- 5 enemy types: Guard, SS Soldier, Officer, Dog, Mutant
- 4 weapons: Knife, Luger P08 pistol, MP40 submachine gun, Chain gun
- Classic cheat codes: GOD, GUNS, KEYS, MAP, FPS

## Technology Stack
- Three.js r170 (WebGL 3D engine)
- 33 ES6 JavaScript modules, 15,000+ lines of code
- No build step — pure HTML/JS, deployable anywhere

## AI-Generated Assets
- 7 animated 3D enemy models (Meshy v6 via fal.ai + Blender 5.1 rigging)
- 30+ textures and sprites (Flux via fal.ai)
- 15+ German voice lines (ElevenLabs, eleven_multilingual_v2)
- 11 original music tracks (Suno AI)
- 16+ sound effects (ElevenLabs Sound Generation)
- Total AI generation cost: approximately $6 USD

## Creator
Richard Theuws — Founder of Theuws Consulting
- Website: https://theuws.com
- Location: Bladel, Netherlands
- Background: 25+ years entrepreneurship, founder of Metal Business Club (170+ entrepreneurs)

## AI Game Master
Claude Opus 4.6 by Anthropic — served as project manager, creative director, and technical architect.
7 specialized sub-agents: Game Analyzer, Asset Generator, 3D Animation Director, Audio Director, Scenario Writer, Game Deployer, Game Master Improvement.

## Source
Part of a portfolio of 29+ browser games at https://theuws.com/games/
